title: Metallurgy: Don't Pull Mold
description: Makes so that molds in Create: Metallurgy do not get pulled out of casting table by hoppers, funnels, pipes, etc.
body:
# Metallurgy: Don't Pull Mold

### Summary
This mod is an addon for [Create: Metallurgy](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-metallurgy ), which prevents Molds from being pulled out from the Casting Table by Hoppers, Funnels, Pipes from other mods, etc.

Without this, automating your smeltery becomes... let's say... tricky. Tricky as hell.

## ATTENTION!
Use this mod **ONLY** if you want to play with [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create ) version below 0.6, and therefore are forced to use Create: Metallurgy version 0.0.6. In Metallurgy versions 0.0.7 and above, there already exists functionality for controlling whether molds get pulled out of the casting table or not — and that system is much more advanced and flexible than this mod provides.
